meaning: 伏尔加河[苏联西部](欧洲第一大河)
examples: The first German village in southwestern Siberia was founded a century ago by settlers from the Volga region.
Children travelling to Moscow on Volga river.
There's no magic in the Yangtse River any more than the Volga, Rhine or Hudson.
In Saratov, a town on the Volga dominated by the defence industry, the party was trounced in August.
